hotel_name: Biệt thự Sunkissed Paddy Hoi An (Sunkissed Paddy Hoi An Villa)

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Value for money

reviews.title: Friendly and caring
reviews.positives: The pool was an added benefit although I didn’t use it, but friends did. Rooms were sizable with a sofa and a counter to make coffee, a small fridge. Aircon was welcome on the warm days. It was a short walk to old town and a short ride to the beach. The best part was the staff - friendly, caring, solicitous. I was there to rest and I did, the place was peaceful. There is some construction nearby and some nights there is a loud guy singing karaoke not well, but other than these the Sunkissed Paddy villa was an oasis of rest in Hoi An.

reviews.title: Not for me...
reviews.text: Sunkissed Paddy is in a beautiful setting surrounded by rice fields on the edge of town.  The pool is very clean and overlooks the rice fields.  The breakfast is the worst I have ever seen, which very much surprised us.  The rooms were not that great either (you could see into their storage room from our bathroom, so you can only imagine what they could see!).  Would definitely never stay again and would never recommend anyone to stay here!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
very nice and helpful staff! The hotel is very well located, between the beach and the old city. You can reach both by bike, which are available for free at the hotel.
The pool is very enjoyable on the warm days.
reviews.negatives:
The breakfast offer could be a bit better, with more fruits, tea, etc.
The pressure of the shower was a bit weak.
The staff does not always speak english (Especially the night shift)

reviews.title: Mixed feeling
reviews.text: Hotel out of town . 40min walk , 10min by bike . New hotel, breakfast limited choice needs to improve . Lady in the morning can communicate well in English , other hours no .

reviews.title: Had a nice time in general.
reviews.positives:
Location of the hotel is very good. Accommodation is comfortable for couple’s stay. I strongly recommend to use rented scooter/ bike to go around the place to be on your own for travel + cost effective. Grab taxi is another option for emergency. Please contact hotel staff for further assistance.

Hotel Supervisor THAM is extremely sweet, caring and helping. Will give a special rating for her.
Other staff is also very sweet and supportive. 
As the country has just opened for tourism post covid I am sure the hotel will have many other services to restore.

Hoi An town is very nice for a 2-3 days stay, nice for shopping in Night market. Indian restaurant Baba’s Kitchen is available in a short distance. For vegetarians please check out for Himalaya Restaurant (for vegetarians) which will be opening soon in Hoi An. DaNang city also has Himalaya, Maharaja and Mr.India restaurants for those looking for Indian cuisine. Please choose the correct season to vist the place to enjoy your stay.

reviews.title: Very good for long-term stay.
reviews.text: Our family had a 4-night stay, but we were very satisfied with the fact that there was a swimming pool for the price. It became a pleasant trip.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Nice place in good location if you like to do the rice field coffee, you can just walk to chillax, roving, secret cafe, nhac thran classic and so on

Down to mainroat is also only ten minute walk
Beds are comfortable, food was good
reviews.negatives:
Toilet is a bit too much audio with the neighbours toilet, you hear everything, but only in the toilet.
Feature for some, for some a bug :-D

reviews.title: Relaxing while gazing at the countryside landscape.
reviews.text: When it comes to Hoi An, the old town is famous, but if you have small children, it can be hot to walk around the old town during the day, and kids can get bored. If you think it's better to relax with your family by the pool while enjoying the countryside views during the day, and take a little stroll in the old town at night, then this place is recommended. The pool is not too big, so you can comfortably keep an eye on your children.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: A charming and beautiful place. The staff is very nice and kind, especially Thắm who helped us with everything we needed. The rooms are beautiful and cozy, the bed is comfortable, highly recommend

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Nice view, clean, attentive staff, delicious food.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Beautiful villa with a nice view, pool, and free bicycles for exploring the nearby town. We really enjoyed our stay here!
reviews.negatives: Not many of the staff members speak English so it was difficult to communicate our needs or questions at times. Some of the bicycles were not in the best shape.

reviews.title: Worry-free stay
reviews.text: My wife and I traveled to Vietnam for the first time. Fortunately, we started here. The stay was very comfortable, no noise, and even a bird was used as an alarm clock. The reception and chefs were very friendly, and the breakfast was delicious!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Really nice and helpful staff. Our room was very clean. The hotel is in  a great location. We borrowed free bicycles and went for a nice ride between rice fields and went to the coconut boat ride nearby! We enjoyed our stay!

reviews.title: Nice stay here
reviews.text: Everything is fine have a good stay here

reviews.title: Perfect, peaceful, beautiful trip!
reviews.positives:
Very clean, beautiful, and comfortable!
The staff were so helpful and friendly. Quiet, peaceful view with breakfast cooked for you in the morning. I can't wait to stay here again!

reviews.title: Charming
reviews.text: A charming property with charming staff!

reviews.title: Wonderful, awesome staff
reviews.positives: Beautiful, nicely located, free bicycles. Most friendly and helpful staff ever. Ms Thắm kindly helped us book the bus tickets for our next destination, kept contact and arranged the pick up with the bus company, and even let us use the facilities (the pool and the shower in particular) after check out. Thank you!
reviews.negatives: None, everything was perfect

reviews.title: Experienced
reviews.text:
We recently had the pleasure of staying at sunkissed paddy and it was truly an unforgettable experience. From the moment we arrived, we were greeted with warmth and exceptional service. The staff went above and beyond to ensure that every aspect of our stay was perfect.


Overall, our experience exceeded all expectations. We cannot recommend it highly enough and look forward to returning in the future.

reviews.title: A wonderful escape!
reviews.positives: Nice view, great location, staffs are extremly welcome, supportive, kind. Breakfast is great!

reviews.title: 2nd stay this year
reviews.text: Lovely property and a joy to return to. It's just as the posted photos. Great pool and tasty breakfast which changes every day. Staff are friendly and xaring couldn't ask for more.

reviews.title: Amazing view, kind staff!
reviews.positives: Gorgeous view!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: I arrived late at night, at first I encountered problem with my room and when I raised my concern they immediately addressed it. There is no rice field at that time maybe it was new harvested that is why it is empty. But the breakfast, the staff, the surrounding it is absolutely perfect. I will stay here again with the same room because of the nice view during the day.

reviews.title: Warm, lovely homestay experience in a great location
reviews.positives: Lovely location, awesome views and pool, but most of all the staff - so kind and warm, everybody made us feel like we are home!

reviews.title: Highly hospitable staff
reviews.text: I stayed for only one day in May 2026. Since it was after the rice harvest, I couldn't see the scenery of the rice ears spreading out, but the sunset visible from the balcony of my room was very beautiful. On the day of checkout, my wife fell ill, but after checking out, we were allowed to stay by the poolside, where they provided us with bottled water and ice to cool down. I am grateful to the female staff who showed concern for my wife's health. If I get the chance to visit Hoi An again, I would like to return.

reviews.title: We really loved staying here, everything was better than we could have imagined.
reviews.positives:
This hotel was a great surprise, and I would definitely come back. I highly recommend it!
- The staff were extremely friendly and positive. It's clear that they are highly motivated and are continuously striving to improve their service to customers.
- We liked the location surrounded by beautiful rice fields. It was peaceful, and everything we needed was nearby. 
- Overall the hotel area has a great atmosphere. Everything looks like in the pictures. Their pool was large and had a nice view over rice paddies.
- The room and bathroom were very clean and spacious. The bed was one of the most comfortable I have slept in. They clean the room when you want, you just need to put a sign on the door in the morning.
- Very good breakfast. During our stay, they improved their previous regular breakfast to a buffet breakfast. Now the breakfast selection is much larger including toast, fruits & local foods and a chef makes eggs how you like them. They serve lunch and dinner too, there is a menu in the room.
- Each room has a small outdoor terrace with chairs and a table. It's a great place to read, relax, or enjoy the view of the rice paddies.
- Their laundry service was quick and good. We gave them laundry in the morning, and it was ready by evening.
- The key employees spoke very good English. Some staff spoke less English, but the Google Translate app helped a lot.
- They offer airport transfers and taxi services, we used them and can recommend - rides were always on time and with comfortable cars. They also offer tours and have bicycles.
- WiFi was unexpectedly fast and worked excellently most of the time. I successfully made several online calls there.
reviews.negatives: Everything was good during our stay.

reviews.title: Wonderful! Beautiful scenery, good price.
reviews.text: The most deserving place to experience in Hoi An, with a view overlooking the fields, a clean and airy space, the access road is quite narrow but still okay for cars. There is a swimming pool, an old billiard table, and a light breakfast. The room is quite old but very clean in return. The owner is friendly and enthusiastic. In summary, this is a place I will definitely come back to!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Very pretty location
Friendly, helpful staff

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: Love the country side environment. It is so close to the rice fields.  Very relaxing stay.  If they have a elevator will be perfect.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: One of the best stays in my life ! Very good location, rooms, breakfast.. The host was always smiling and willing to help !

reviews.title: Great Location, amazing Staffs!
reviews.text: We stayed in Hoi an for 4 nights. We booked this hotrl because of location. We arrived and greeted with smiles and was able to checked in early!. Location is perfect. A lil bit of of town which is good away from hussle and bustle. Beautiful view on rice field. Bikes are free, perfect transpo to explore the rice paddies, town and the beach! Grab is only about $2-3 to town or to beach. Breakfast was great. Freshly cooked everyday, lots of options on buffet! Spacious  and clean room, very comfortable bed. We will definitely stay here again if we come back to Hoi an. :)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Amazing location right between the town and the beach. Free bicycles so you could get to either quickly. Staff were really friendly and helpful. Rooms were lovely, such a beautiful place. Pool really nice for hot days. Breakfast was also lovely. Could not recommend more.
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Beautiful location!
reviews.text: Beautiful location in the middle of rice paddy’s! Was on the more expensive side but you get a pool, bikes and breakfast included. The breakfast options weren’t my favourite, I think I would’ve liked a breakfast buffet that included muesli/cereal. This place is perfect for remote workers as it’s close to the co hub so a lot of people here were working. Great atmosphere and was very sociable when I was there! If you need to go to old town and don’t want to cycle, grabs are also very cheap.

reviews.title: I really enjoy my stay and extended 2 times in this hotel :)

I am raraly putting a 10 but here everything is perfect
