reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Cute little hotel, nice pool and room. Loved the area next to the rice fields

reviews.title: Lovely and quiet stay in the countryside of Hoi An
reviews.positives: We booked this place for 5 days because of its quiet location and rice paddy views. We loved the home-cooked breakfast and service was very attentive. THĂM, the receptionist, was very friendly and knowledgeable about places to visit in Hoi An. The room was spacious and the bed was comfy. Thank you for taking care of us!

reviews.title: Nice relaxing environment
reviews.text: The hotel is right next to the rice field.  It is enjoyable to bike around the field and or to the vegetable gardens in the sun rise or sun set.  However it would be perfect if the hotel has an elevator.

reviews.title: We had a lovely and very relaxing time at Sunkissed Paddy Hoi A Villa. We’d definitely stay again!
reviews.positives: Facilities were very new and clean, staff are very sweet and kind, and the location is great for both visiting the old town as well as the beach (free bikes available to get around).
reviews.negatives: Nothing!

reviews.title: Simply the best
reviews.text:
In four visits to Hoi An over the years Sunkissed Paddy is the most comfortable hotel, with the most helpful staff, I have stayed in.
The location is convenient just outside the town with an enchanting rural outlook. The swimming pool is refreshing and shaded from the intense sun. The rooms are bright and airy, especially those on the upper floors, although the showers could do with a little more caring maintenance. And the staff are excellent, from caring and efficient reception desk to welcoming breakfast verandah cooks and waiters to the ladies servicing the rooms, all were excellent
 Particular thanks must go to Ti who when I arrived too early to check in, hot and dehydrated after a long ride north ensured I got plenty of water before I could reach the welcome sanctuary of my cooled room.

reviews.title: What a shiny gem in town!
reviews.positives: I was impressed by this place. The room is spacious, clean. The decoration, the view is vividly beautiful. Budget villa but 5-star service. Everything is perfect. I definitely come back. Thank you for your subtlety and extra mile service.

reviews.title: A great place to relax.
reviews.text: The accommodation is kept clean, and the breakfast is simple but tasty. The staff are all friendly. The pool is also well-maintained. I would like to come again next time.

reviews.title: Relación calidad/precio, estupendo.
reviews.positives: El personal del hotel es realmente amable. La habitación amplia y limpia. El desayuno bastante completo (tenían desayuno occidental y asiático). Las camas cómodas. Piscina muy agradable y limpia para ir a bañarte después de todo el día dando tumbos.Te dejan bicicletas gratis para acercarte al centro si no alquilas moto.
reviews.negatives: Estaba bastante alejado de todo el meollo, pero podías ir con moto, bicicleta o Grab.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Staff were great and super friendly, they helped us book a taxi to Da Nang which was cheaper than taking a grab.  Breakfast was a small selection but also great with local noodle option, omelette and small buffet. Housekeeping came to clean the room everyday. Location is a little bit further from the town centre and night markets but not that far away as we could take grabs. Pool was also nice with a view of the rice paddy view. We were also given a little souvenir by the staff before we left, overall a great stay and would come back again.

reviews.title: Un Oasis en Hoi An
reviews.positives:
Todo! La ubicación, las instalaciones, el
Personal, es un alojamiento con encanto en una ubicación perfecta entre la ciudad y la playa, a 10mins en moto de cada una. Tiene una infinity pool con vistas a los campos arroz Que es una pasada…pegarse un baño y relajarse viendo la hierba mecerse, es un regalo. Los atardeceres son de ensueño. Respecto al personal es maravilloso y encantador, además te ayudarán en todo lo que  necesites con tu viaje. Tienen bicis gratuitas para los huéspedes y alquiler de motos.las camas son muy cómodas y el desayuno esta fenomenal, super completo! Volvería a alojarme aquí sin dudarlo! 100% recomendable

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The mattress is super comfortable, the view is also great, it’s just a pity that the bathroom is not well-ventilated, causing a bit of discomfort in the room.

reviews.title: Bonito alojamiento fuera del centro
reviews.positives: El entorno del alojamiento es muy bonito. Puedes disfrutar de bicicletas gratis sin reserva previa. Hay posibilidad de early check in si hay disponibilidad. Las habitaciones son muy amplias y están muy limpias. La cama y las almohadas son muy comodas. Las vistas desde la habitacion son bonitas. El desayuno es muy completo y el cocinero que lo prepara es muy simpatico y cocina muy bien.
reviews.negatives: Por la ubicacion del alojamiento, el cual esta un poco apartado del centro si quieres volver en Grab de noche tienes que hacerlo en moto ya que no hay disponibilidad de coche.

reviews.title: Amazing staff, and beautiful place
reviews.text: I stayed here for two nights and the staff were wonderful! Tham the host was very sweet, and helped my friend and I sort a sleeper bus from hoi an to Ninh Binh. She also let us check in early, and looked after me. I very much  recommend this stay.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Buen sitio para pasar unos días, justo cerca de los campos de arroz. Muy cerca del coworking.

reviews.title: Wonderful space
reviews.text: Although the location is a bit away from Hoi An's old town, it is in a quiet place surrounded by countryside, which is very soothing. The staff is friendly and kind. It was a bit disappointing that the room had a slightly musty smell and there was no trash can in the room, but the room was clean and very cutely decorated, which was nice. Bicycles are available for rental, although they are a bit old.

reviews.title: Buena opción en Hoi An
reviews.positives: Bonito hotel entre arrozales. Limpio y con una piscina fabulosa.
reviews.negatives: El desayuno es escaso.

reviews.title: Very Helpful and Friendly Lady
reviews.text: A very cute place with a friendly lady receptionist. She was very helpful and offered us the coconut boat experience with her dad. I loved her dad even if he cannot speak english but communicates with sign language. Made our stay very memorable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Ubicación inmejorable, justo enfrente de los campos de arroz pero a escasos 7 minutos en moto del centro de Hoi An y de la playa. Habitaciones amplias y cómodas. Piscina con vistas a los arrozales y desayuno completo. Además dispone de servicio de lavandería y te gesitonan el alquiler de moto si lo necesitas. Por último y no menos importante, el personal es un amor: siempre con una sonrisa y buscando la forma de ayudarte.

reviews.title: Beautiful sunsets and great brekfast 👌
reviews.text:
After 1 week we decided to stay 1 week more, because this place has such a good atmosphere, very kind stuff 🫶, great breakfast and beautiful sunsets which you can enjoy from pool. Bicycles are for free and you can get to the beach or to Hoi An city. Many good restaurants in this area. Room and pool perfectly clean.

Thank you!

reviews.title: Precioso hotel
reviews.positives: El hotel es espectacular. Tal y como se ve en las imágenes. Tiene bicis gratis que te dejan con las que puedes ir a la playa o hasta el centro de hoi an.
reviews.negatives: El hotel está algo alejado del centro lo que hace que te tengas que mover en grab o taxi.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: We stayed here just under a week and didn’t want to leave! Tham really took care of us, it was my friends birthday and they decorated the room with rose petals and sang and gave her a personalized cake! Thank you so much! The pool is so lovely and clean, yummy breakfast w fresh fruits and breads and chef makes egg dishes. Comfy bed, lovely view, nice shower pressure and hot water

reviews.title: Muy Agusto
reviews.positives: El servicio muy amable, la cama muy comoda, el baño también y muy limpio y la piscina estupenda.

reviews.title: Beautiful and Serene
reviews.text: Located in a serene area of Hoi An that is quiet and beautiful, and within a short walking distance of the main street with lots of great restaurants and markets.  They offer free bikes, and are located next to a great path to either walk or bike through the rice paddies. The staff was wonderful and extremely kind!   Breakfast was delicious and varied with great fruit options, eggs, toast, and savory items like fried rice, noodles, and curries (don't skip out on the delicious homemade jam!).  We really enjoyed our stay and would love to stay again next time we visit Hoi An.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La localización genial, cama comodísima y todo muy cuidado

reviews.title: Perfect stay in an ideal location
reviews.text: I had 15 lovely nights at Sunkissed Paddy Hoi An. Spacious clean room, great view over rice fields, decent WIFI and good water pressure. The location was ideal for me being halfway between the ancient town and the beach. I reached both by the free to use bicycles or taxis are also easy to source. Great friendly helpful team working there unfortunately didn't get all the names but just a special mention to Hieu who arranged a taxi for me to the airport on the evening of new years eve TET.  Would definitely recommend and stay again. Thank you all at Sunkissed Paddy Hoi An.

reviews.title: Very good 👍🏻😊
reviews.positives: Es muy bello el hotel y la ubicación bien tranquila 😇. El personal un amor, ofrecen coordinar taxi y tienen buenas opciones de desayuno, muy cordiales y ayudan en todo 🥰.

reviews.title: What a wonderful place!
reviews.text: We are staying here for a week and it has been amazing so far. Property as well maintained and staff is friendly and helpful. We would definitely stay here again. The area is quiet, but yet you’re still close to the hustle and bustle of Hoi An.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La localisation était bien, facile de se rendre dans le centre de Hoi an
reviews.negatives: Petit déjeuner très léger, pas grand chose de proposé. Le ménage laisse à désirer, une invasion de fourmis a été retrouvé dans le lit

reviews.title: Schönes ruhiges Hotel nicht im Gewusel
reviews.text: Die Zeit war toll grosse Zimmer. Es hat alles was es braucht. Wifi funktionniert und das Frühstück toll. Die Leute sehr nett und helfen einem wo sie können.  Ich komme wieder.

reviews.title: Personnel très gentil Tham , yu , et le cuisinier sont très sympathiques , la piscine est très bien , et super petit déj
reviews.positives: Le calme

reviews.title: Will definitely go back!
reviews.text: Great location! Quite clean and great staff!

reviews.title: Belle vue, calme, bon rapport qualité-prix
reviews.positives: La vue splendide sur les rizières, calme, décoration, l'emplacement en dehors du bruit du centre ville, la location gratuite de vélos
reviews.negatives: Le petit déjeuner (buffet,entre 7h et 10h) : arrivés à 8h15, il n'y avait plus beaucoup de choix, dommage.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Amazing people, food was good, very central to everything. I would stay here again for sure

reviews.title: Hôtel familial bien situé
reviews.positives: La chambre que nous avions mériterait un rafraîchissement. Par contre le personnel est très compétent et très sympathique. Nous avons passé un excellent séjour

reviews.title: CLOSE EXPERIENCE WITH NATURE
reviews.text: The hotel is located near the fields, with a beautiful view. The staff is friendly and very helpful. A plus for the breakfast buffet, the chef is very enthusiastic and friendly with guests. The hotel has bicycles for guests to ride around. Overall: 10/10 and will definitely return.

reviews.title: Très bon rapport qualité / prix, nous avons adoré notre séjour à Hoi An
reviews.positives:
Personnel très aimable 
Chambre agréable et literie impeccable 
Hôtel au calme de la ville, dans les rizières 
Possibilité d’emprunter des vélos
reviews.negatives:
Rien si ce n’est un petit détail : pas de sèche-cheveux dans la chambre
Plus de choix de petit déjeuner sucré aurait été appréciable

reviews.title: I'm Ready to Return
reviews.text: I absolutely loved this place.  It was the peaceful, relaxing getaway that I needed. The countryside with the lush green rice fields was beautiful, and I got to ride a bike along the fields. The villa has bikes that guests can sign up to use. They also provided a large umbrella in the room that I was able to use for my walks. Additionally, the chef prepared a delicious breakfast spread each morning, even providing freshly squeezed juice. The staff was amazing. I definitely look forward to returning.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
L'emplacement est parfait pour ceux qui cherche un entre deux entre ville et campagne.
La décoration est belle.
reviews.negatives: Les photos sont superbes et datent de quelques années lorsque l'hôtel était neuf. On voit qu'un nettoyage de fond est necaissaire dans les chambres (points d'humidité). Le mobilier un un peu vieilli également.

reviews.title: Hidden gem in Hoi An, beautiful rice paddy view, quiet and serene!
reviews.text: We our loving our stay at sunkissed paddy field villa, it’s a boutique hotel with all the necessities for a comfortable, quiet and peaceful stay in Hoi an. Welcoming pool, beautiful views of rice paddy fields right in front of hotel, great breakfast comfy clean room and beds, friendly staff. Complimentary bicycles provided to explore the area, close to many restaurants and shops. Highly recommended !

reviews.title: Nous avons passé un agréable séjour dans cet hôtel. Un peu éloigné de la ville mais l’hôtel met à disposition des vélos
reviews.positives: Grande chambre et piscine agréable. Employés attentionnés
reviews.negatives: Manque d’espace de rangement dans la chambre et la salle de bain. Immeuble en construction juste à côté

reviews.title: I will definitely come back here when I go to Hoi An.
reviews.text: The hotel is quiet, the rooms are clean, airy, and have a view of the rice fields.

reviews.title: très bel hôtel avec une vue magnifique sur les riziéres
reviews.positives: la piscine et le personnel
reviews.negatives: les deux premières nuits ont été bruyantes car un groupe de personnes faisaient beaucoup de bruit

reviews.title: Great choice
reviews.text: Sunkiss is located not far from the ancient town center, making it easy to get around by bike (free of charge). The space is airy and suitable for resting and relaxing after a day of exploring Hoi An.

reviews.title: Bel établissement confortable
reviews.positives: La proximité de la ville, ATM, essence et petite supérette. Belle établissement très confortable au calme

reviews.title: short trip
reviews.text: Stayed one night here before heading to Quang Ngai, about two hours away. Fell in love with the city despite visiting in early May when the rice fields were harvested, dried out, and being burned. Although I spoke Vietnamese, I noticed the staff communicated in English with other guests quite well. Borrowed a bike from the property — most had flat tires, but luckily one was still usable. The breakfast buffet was simple with fruits, vegetables, and bread. They were preparing Vietnamese dishes too, but I couldn’t stay long enough to try them. Overall, the room was clean, bed was good enough, bathroom doesn't have ventilation so it can be hot and humid in there. Pool was pretty.

reviews.title: Bien
reviews.positives:
Hôtel agréable, personnel aussi.
Chambre propre.
Frigo dans la chambre. Clim, wifi. 
Petit déjeuner correct. 
Possibilité de laisser les bagages. 
Personnel très arrangeant.
Vélos gratuits disponibles.
reviews.negatives:
Peu de personnel parle anglais.
Obscurité non possible en chambre car stores vénitiens donc on se réveille avec le soleil à 5h...
On aurait aimé avoir un lit pour notre fille mais malgré notre demande ça n'a pas été le cas.
A cette époque de l'année (début mai), les rizières étaient brûlées donc vue très différente des photos de l'annonce !! Et odeur de brûlé car les rizières alentours étaient aussi régulièrement en feu.

reviews.title: Great service
reviews.text: This place is absolutely stunning with the rice fields view, staffs are friendly, affordable, and well clean. They also provide bikes to use. I like to take the bike riding around the rice fields it was very relaxing. I will definitely come back to stay here on my next trip to Hoi An.

reviews.title: Un bel hôtel à Hoi an
reviews.positives:
- La piscine au pied des rizières 
- L’emplacement au calme, ville et plage facilement accessibles en vélo prêtés par l’hôtel 
- Les chambres modernes et lumineuses 
- Un grand merci spécial à Tham, personne exceptionnelle,  qui s’est pliée en quatre pour nous faire plaisir. Répondre à nos demandes et nous rendre le séjour agréable
reviews.negatives: - Difficile de communiquer avec les autres employés ( qui ne parle aucune langue étrangère )quand Tham n’est pas là, heureusement qu’on avait son tel

reviews.title: Incredible stay
reviews.text: Had a wonderful stay here. Lovely staff, incredible breakfast, fab pool, big spacious room and clean/light-filled bathroom. Couldn’t fault - would recommend

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Hotel très bien placé en dehors du bruit de la ville vélo à disposition personnel très agréable

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: My vacation has been really pleasant and lovely coming here, thank you ❤️

reviews.title: Un havre de paix à Hoi An
reviews.positives: L’emplacement et la tranquillité, le cadre (rizières)
reviews.negatives: Parc de vélos vieillissant

reviews.title: Great place with lovely staff
reviews.text: Beautiful location with friendly and lovely staff. Bikes to cycle to the beach or town available for free on scooters available for hire. Perfect sunset view. Great breakfast.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Un peu excentré, dans les rizière mais avec les vélos gratuits disponible c'est très facile de se deplacer.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: A pretty ideal place for those who want to find a quiet spot to enjoy.

reviews.title: agréable et confortable.au milieu des rizières mais proche de la ville exceptionnelle
reviews.positives: la situation et l’accueil
reviews.negatives: rien ne m’a déplu

reviews.title: A beautiful villa
reviews.text: This is my first time I come to here. A beautiful place to enjoy

reviews.title: très belle expérience je recommande
reviews.positives:
Le personnel , très à l'écoute malgré le barrage de la langue
L'emplacement est idéal en bordure de rizières dans un quartier très authentique et un peu éloigné de la vieille ville attraction touristique majeure

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel with helpful kind staff
reviews.text: We absolutely loved this hotel, the rooms are beautiful with windows on both sides. The breakfast is included and is delicious. The staff are so friendly and helpful.  The location is away from the hustle and bustle of the old town but only a short taxi/grab in. Or you can use one of the hotels bikes for free! We loved everything about this hotel.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Superbe accueil. Personnel très gentil. Bon petit déjeuner et situation géographique parfaite : une peu éloignée du centre ville (on peut y aller en vélo prêtés par l'établissement) mais du coup c'est au calme dans les rizières (car le centre est très touristique)! Si on devait revenir à hoi an, on reviendrait dans cet hôtel.

reviews.title: Really nice
reviews.text: Lovely place, stayed here with a few friends and we all had a great stay.

reviews.title: Très bon séjour !
reviews.positives: L’emplacement, le cadre, la piscine
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Beautiful Villa in Perfect Location
reviews.text: Could not recommend this place more. My partner and I had a lovely stay. The rooms are large and air conditioning & fan make it very pleasant. Great facilities, the pool is a good size and very clean with amazing views. Staff are all very helpful and friendly. The location is just 5/10 mins by car/bike from central Hoi An.  Bike rental is easy and at the end of the street is the best Bahn Mi you will ever have 😍

reviews.title: Très bien
reviews.positives:
- Chambre spacieuse et confortable
- Disponibilité du personnel
- Piscine incroyable
- Vélos disponibles et en quantité
- Emplacement au calme dans les rizières tout en étant à 10-15min à vélo du Vieux Quartier
reviews.negatives: - Buffet du petit-déjeuner avec peu de choix et non renouvelé (tant pis pour vous si vous arrivez après de gros mangeurs et égoïstes..)

reviews.title: Super
reviews.text: Super hôtel … propre avec un prix abordable … personel très attentionné ! Merci pour tout :)

reviews.title: Excellent séjour
reviews.positives: Le personnel est extrêmement aimable et sympathique! La chambre est très confortable.    La piscine est agréable, des vélos sont a disposition. Le restaurant sert quasiment a toute heure du jour si besoin. Tham nous a aidé pour louer un scooter. Le coucher de soleil sur les rizières est magnifique depuis l'hôtel
reviews.negatives: Le petit déjeuner n'est pas extraordinaire mais rien de bien grave

reviews.title: Notre meilleur logement au Vietnam !
reviews.text:
Super logement ! Les chambres sont spacieuses et propres.
Le personnel est adorable.
La vue sur les rizières est superbe (malgré le bruit de la route passante en face).
Le petit déjeuner est super bon, varié, copieux et vietnamien.
Les vélos en libre service sont parfaits pour aller en ville, à la plage et parcourir les rizières.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Localisation proche des plages et du centre avec des vélos gratuit à disposition, et la vue sur les rizières est incroyable, et nous avons été accueilli très chaleureusement par le staff je recommande les yeux fermé

reviews.title: Superbe hôtel au milieu des rizières
reviews.text:
Les chambres sont confortables et propres. L'hôtel ne compte pas beaucoup de chambre ce qui rend l'endroit calme et relaxant.

Il est possible d'emprunter des vélos pour faire le tour des rizières.

Par contre, l'hôtel est loin du centre, il vaut mieux prendre le taxi.

reviews.title: La perfection pour le prix
reviews.positives:
Nous avons tout simplement TOUT aimé. Thiam, nôtre hôte, était exceptionnelle et très disponible même quand celle ci n'était pas présente (WhatsApp). L'emplacement est idéal : proche de tous les points d'intérêts de la région et piscine très propre donnant sur les rizières. Nous n'avons pas profité des vélos mais ils sont disponibles gratuitement à l'hôtel. Nous avons loué des scooters à un prix très abordable grâce à eux directement livrés à l'hôtel. Gros cœur pour le petit déjeuner que nous avons trouvé varié et très bon (la confiture d'ananas était exceptionnelle tout comme le jus de pastèque ❤️). Vous avez même du personnel pour faire cuire fraîchement vos œufs et sa gentillesse est aussi à souligner. Tous les matins vos serviettes sont changées et des bouteilles d'eau vous sont remises sur votre terrasse. 
Les chambres sont spacieuses, les salles de bain aussi et la propreté est au rdv.
Nous avons été tristes de quitter cet endroit tellement tout était parfait.
reviews.negatives: Ne changez rien ! Tout était parfait.

reviews.title: Excentré mais chouette
reviews.text: Chouette hôtel avec jolie vue. Les chambres sont plutôt confortables et propres.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Superbe hôtel avec un très bon accueil. Un peu éloigné de l'agitation du centre ville.
Tout le confort y est. Le personnel est très agréable et serviable. Arrêtez vous par ici si vous êtes de passage.

reviews.title: Bon hôtel
reviews.text:
Hôtel à l’extérieur de Hoi an, au milieu des rizières, calme. 
Personnel sympathique et arrangeant. 

À 30 min à pied du centre historique, possibilité d’emprunter des vélos pour s’y rendre

reviews.title: Merveilleux sejour
reviews.positives:
J'ai aimé :
La vue sur les rizières. La chambre spacieuse et joliment décorée. Le petit déjeuner préparé devant soi par un super chef de cuisine tres sympa. Le personnel tres souriant, attentionné.
L'emplacement un peu a l'écart entre ville et mer.
reviews.negatives: Rien. Vraiment.

reviews.title: Je recommande vivement !
reviews.text: Hôtel bien placé entre mer et ville historique, grande suite très propre. Personnel très sympathique et à l’écoute de tout vos besoins (aide pour un tailleurs, taxi vers l’aéroport). Merci encore Thắm pour ce merveilleux séjour !

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
L'hôtel etait parfait.
Le personnel adorable.
Très bien situé.

reviews.title: Belle expérience
reviews.text: Nous avons passé un excellent séjour dans cet hôtel. L’endroit est paisible, situé au calme avec une très belle vue sur les rizières, ce qui offre une atmosphère reposante. La piscine est magnifique, parfaite pour se détendre en fin de journée. Les chambres sont propres et bien entretenues. Toute l’équipe est accueillante, souriante. Un vrai plus : il est possible de louer des scooters directement sur place pour explorer les environs facilement, et des vélos sont également mis à disposition gratuitement. Un petit havre de paix que nous recommandons sans hésiter !

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: le gentillesse du personnel . la vue superbe de l hotel. sur les rizières. la beauté  des chambres

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Für das Geld war es ok aber gebit schönere hotels in der gegend

reviews.title: Formidable
reviews.positives:
L'équipe est formidable, aux petits soins pour chacun. Énorme merci et amitiés à Tam à la réception et Huoang le cuisinier, ainsi qu'au personnel de ménage.
Près de la ville environ 2,8 kms et des plages à même distance. Loin de l'agitation de la ville et tout près de restaurants et d'un marché local.

reviews.title: Lovely stay
reviews.text: We totally enjoyed our stay there. Room was clean and staff very kind. Thank you very much for everything.

reviews.title: Séjour magnifique au coeur des rizières
reviews.positives:
La localisation est parfaite en plein coeur des rizières l’endroit est très calme . 
La vue sur les rizières est magnifique l’hotel contient une quinzaine de chambre très intime taille idéale pour se reposer . 
La chambre était spacieuse propre et jolie avec une literie très confortable la piscine est magnifique. 
Le personnel souriant et très accueillant je recommande cet établissement

reviews.title: Traumhaft und Super Service
reviews.text: Es ist eine unglaublich gut gelegene Villa mitten in den Reisfeldern. Ich habe hier sehr gut geschlafen und der Service rund um die Unterkunft war super 👍

reviews.title: Super séjour
reviews.positives: Le personnel, toujours prêt à nous aider

reviews.title: Entspannte Unterkunft
reviews.text: Gute Lage mitten in den Reisfeldern. Tolle Leute arbeiten dort und Zimmer sind sauber. Wird jetzt mein Stammhotel für Hoi An.

reviews.title: Détente
reviews.positives:
La gentillesse du personnel
L'emplacement
La piscine avec vue sur les rizières
Les vélos à disposition

reviews.title: We loved it!
reviews.text:
We stayed several nights at Sunkissed Paddy and had a wonderful experience. The location is fantastic, right in the middle of the rice fields with a beautiful view. The property itself is small and cozy, which makes the atmosphere very personal and welcoming.

The staff were incredibly friendly and caring throughout our stay. We also appreciated that bicycles were available for free, and scooters could be rented at a very reasonable price, making it easy to explore the surrounding area.

Breakfast was always fresh and offered a good variety of options. Overall, we really enjoyed our stay and would happily come back again.

reviews.title: Magnifique hôtel dans les rizières!!!
reviews.positives:
La localisation de l’hôtel est top!! Bien que proche de la ville (5 min en scooter), on se sent vraiment à l’écart du bruit et de la folie du marché. L’hôtel est au milieu des rizières avec une vue magnifique (depuis la piscine et depuis le balcon), très relaxant et très chouette pour le sunset. Des vélos sont mis gratuitement à disposition. Et le staff nous a aidé à louer un scooter (150.000 đồng/jour). La chambre est spacieuse avec un bon balcon vue sur les rizières. 

Gros point positif aussi pour le staff avec notamment Thắm qui parle très bien français et anglais. Elle a été d’une grande aide dans l’organisation de notre voyage. Merci à elle!!
reviews.negatives: Les rideaux de la chambre sont pas très occultants donc la lumière du jour rentre des 5-6h du mat.

reviews.title: Super Unterkunft zwischen Altstadt und Strand
reviews.text:
Gemütliche Unterkunft mit super Lage. Große und saubere Zimmer.
Mopedverleih unkompliziert.

Frühstück ausreichend.
Tolles Restaurant gleich nebenan.

Wir können das Hotel sehr empfehlen.

reviews.title: Un super séjour !
reviews.positives: Le personnel est très gentil et arrangeant. La chambre est grande et confortable avec la clim. La piscine est parfaite et dispose de zones d’ombre très agréables avec la chaleur. La localisation est à 5min du centre de Hoi An.
reviews.negatives: Le petit déjeuner serait à améliorer et il faudrait mettre des stores occultants dans les chambres car il y a beaucoup de lumières qui passe.

reviews.title: Super schönes Hotel, gute Lage
reviews.text: Die Lage ist zwischen der Altstadt und dem Meer, man kommt mit den Rädern super zu beidem in 10/15 Minuten. Das Personal ist sehr nett, das Frühstück lecker, die Zimmer sauber und groß :) was will man mehr. Super Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis. Und nur ein paar Minuten vom Coworking entfernt.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Génial incroyable lieux et service

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Dont worry be happy!

reviews.title: Séjour fabuleux
reviews.positives: Tout était très bien. L’emplacement, la chambre, la piscine. L’accueil chaleureux de Tham et de l’ensemble du personnel. Les vélos à disposition. Le service de lessive et le chauffeur pour aller à l’aéroport! Le buffet du petit déjeuner excellent!
reviews.negatives: Rien!

reviews.title: Mooie ligging, kamers wat oud
reviews.text:
Gezien de prijs en de ligging van het hotel is het een prima plek om 1 of 2 nachten te verblijven. 
De kamers zijn wat oud, lakens wat vochtig, wat smoezelig hier en daar, dus daar kan nog wat verbeterd worden.
Maar voor de prijs (20euro) prima plek en met natuurlijk een lekker zwembad en hele mooie zonsondergang met uitzicht over de rijstvelden!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Chambre nickel, piscine top, 
Emplacement parfait
Velo gratuit

reviews.title: Heerlijk verblijf in zeer prettige accommodatie!
reviews.text: We hebben heerlijke dagen hier gehad, gratis fietsen om naar Hoi An te rijden . Zeer prettig en vriendelijk personeel en een fijne rustige plek om te verblijven. Bedden zijn uitzonderlijk goed!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Localisation en face des rizières .
Personnel sympathique et aide apprécié a l'organisation des activités autonomes ou organisées
reviews.negatives: L'intimité limité des chambres avec lit jumeaux localisées au rez de chaussée en face de la piscine

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 시골 풍경 힐링 하기 좋은 숙소 입니다

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Les chambres très confortables et la piscine au coucher du soleil !

reviews.title: Wonderful peaceful place
reviews.text: We had a great time in Sunkissed Paddy hotel, the staff was very kind and pleasant, the pool was amazing, specially at evening, everything was just great!

reviews.title: Excellent séjour.
reviews.positives:
Nous avons été très bien accueillis par Tham, qui est très sympathique !
L'emplacement dans les rizières, à 15 min en vélo du centre de Hoi An est idéal.
L'hôtel et sa piscine sont très agréables, le petit déjeuner est très bon, cuisiné sur place.
Je recommande vivement !

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
không có thang máy, không có nhân viên hỗ trợ xách hành lý.
công tắc trong phòng bố trí không hợp lý, không có kệ gần giường.
mạng hay bị mất

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La gentillesse des membres du personnel, la beauté de l'hotel, la piscine, le calme

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: mát mẻ, đẹp, sạch sẽ

reviews.title: Très bon séjour, beau petit hôtel calme et convivial
reviews.positives:
Petit hôtel convivial. Au calme, belle vue sur rizière, belle petite piscine. Staff très sympathique et au petit soin pour les clients.
Petit déjeuner correct.

reviews.title: Pleasent stay
reviews.text: Very nice views from the pool. Good breakfast and hospitality staff. Clean and comfort beds. Pool was alsom 5/5!

reviews.title: Un séjour au top.
reviews.positives:
Un vrai havre de paix dans les rizières qui fait un bien fou après la frénésie de Hoi An. Les chambres sont  grandes, agréables et lumineuses et la piscine est nickel. 
Tham est très attentionnée et d’une grande aide : elle nous a aidé pour commander des taxis et répondre à toutes nos questions.
reviews.negatives: Dommage pour nous: le dernier jour l’hôtel a été occupé par un groupe très bruyant, cela nous a gâché un peu la dernière soirée. Mais cela est indépendant de l’hôtel en lui même

reviews.title: It's fine for the weekend
reviews.text: It's located in a remote area. The only way to get to the city is by taxi. The air conditioning is very noisy and prevented me from sleeping. The hotel is far from the center of the city, so it's quiet outside. The photos of the surroundings on the website are slightly better than in real life. There's a small, warm pool in the sun. You can rent bicycles, but we didn't. The breakfasts were completely disappointing. There wasn't anything suitable for me to eat. Maybe just a slice of watermelon. The drinks were the same. Unfortunately, I wouldn't go back again.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Die Lage in den Reisfelder ist idyllisch, die abendliche Ruhe wird gerne von der Karaoke Bar in der Nachbarschaft gestört.
reviews.negatives:
Man braucht ein Fahrzeug, denn die Altstadt ist zu Fuß 45 Minuten entfernt
Das Frühstück könnte besser sein

reviews.title: Замечательное место
reviews.text: Соотношение цена/качество 10/10! Очень вежливые и улыбчивые сотрудники, маленькая, но опрятная территория, видовой бассейн, немного уставший, но бильярд! Также отель предоставляет велосипеды для прогулок на рисовых полях и бесплатные завтраки в формате шведского стола! Вернемся обязательно ❤️

reviews.title: Es ist sehr schön grün, viele Reisfelder Unterkunft sehr schön
reviews.positives: Jeden Tag wurden die Zimmern richtig schön gereinigt die waren sehr schnell und fleißig. Wirklich über einem Monat in Vietnam. In diesem Hotel waren diese sehr fleißig die Mitarbeiter.
reviews.negatives: Könnte ein bisschen modernisiert werden, die Zimmer

reviews.title: Great!
reviews.text:
We've stayed here two nights and we enjoyed it! Staff is really kind and they washed and folded our clothes for a good price, and same for renting us a motorbike. They have really comfortable bed as well! Pool is open all the time, even after 10 PM but you have to stay quite. Minibar beverages have normal prices. We enjoyed a view of the rice field and it was like in a fairytale. We didn't attend breakfast. 
Just a short hop on the bike and you are on the Hoi An market and old city.
We recommend staying here.

reviews.title: Nettes gutgelegenes Hotel
reviews.positives: Schöne saubere Zimmer. Ein sehr gutes vietnamesisches Frühstücksbuffet. Die Lage zum Strand und zum Zentrum sind mit den Fahrrädern gut zu erreichen. Pool wunderschön. Das Personal war freundlich und hilfsbereit. Vor allem der Koch. Er war immer gut gelaunt.
reviews.negatives:
Check in ( Ankunft im Hotel 11:00 Uhr) war trotzdem das Zimmer fertig war erst ab 13 Uhr möglich oder mit Aufpreis.
Kaffeetassen sind teuer, wenn man eine zerbricht.

reviews.title: Amazing value for money
reviews.text: This place is amazing. I have lived in Vietnam for 6 years now and Hoi An is my favourite place,  this hotel was excellent value for money, the staff were super friendly, very clean and a good location between An Bang and Hoi An town. I would 100% recommend, and will be back.

reviews.title: Sehr zu empfehlen, wir kommen gern wieder !
reviews.positives:
Das Hotel liegt am Rande der Reisfelder. Mit den gratis Fahrrädern kommt man schnell in die Stadt oder zum Strand.
Das Pool war sehr sauber und angenehm warm. Das Frühstück a la carte konnte man auswählen oder es wurde am Wochenede als Buffet serviert. Die Zimmer sind konfortabel und sauber.
Besonders zu erwähnen ist das freundliche und hifsbereite Personal. Der Shuttleservice von und nach  Da Nang war zuverlässig und pünktlich.
reviews.negatives: Alles war perfekt !

reviews.title: The best villa in hoi an.
reviews.text: We made the right decision staying in this villa for 3 days. I hope we stayed here for 6 days. 3 days is not enough :( We didn’t feel that we were on vacation we feel at home. Waking up with a stunning view.  Watching the beautiful sunset. All the staffs are very nice and friendly. They will make sure you’ll have an unforgettable stay. Couldn’t ask for more!  Looking forward to go back here next year.❤️

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Das Frühstück wurde jeden Morgen frisch zubereitet.  Der Koch war sehr nett. Die Unterkunft sieht grundsätzlich aus wie auf den Bildern. 
Wäsche waschen ist möglich für 50.000 pro Kg und ein Moped kostet 150.000 für 24 h
Das Personal war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Die Unterkunft liegt zwischen dem Strand und der Altstadt was für uns optimal war. Um die Ecke ist ein kleiner Italiener.... diesen können wir nur empfehlen,  das Essen war erstklassig!
reviews.negatives:
Die Fahrräder können kostenlos genutzt werden
 Diese sind aber teilweise in einem schlechten Zustand..
 Wir hatten direkt beim ersten Ausflug einen platten. Dadurch dass man nicht zentral gelegen ist, benötigt man aber zwingend ein Fahrrad, Taxi oder Moped zur Fortbewegung.

reviews.title: Schöner Aufenthalt :)
reviews.positives: Das Hotel liegt ruhig am Stadtrand, jedoch ist man mit dem Roller in wenigen Minuten im Zentrum - war für mich perfekt. Das Personal war sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Fahrräder könnten kostenfrei ausgeliehen werden, Roller für wenige Euro pro Tag. Das Zimmer war geräumig, sauber und völlig ausreichend. Frühstück wenig "westlich", das muss einem klar sein, dennoch lecker. Ich könnte etwas früher einchecken, was ebenfalls klasse war!
reviews.negatives: Der Pool war sehr warm und damit keine wirkliche Abkühlung. Zudem könnten mehr Liegestühle bereit gestellt werden - es gab nur zwei. Pooltücher wäre auch nett gewesen. Das ist jedoch alles meckern auf hohem Niveau!

reviews.title: Wir würden wieder kommen 😊
reviews.positives: Das Personal ist super lieb, die Lage des Hotels ist sehr idyllisch und ruhig. Man konnte Fahrräder ausleihen, was wir toll fanden. Das Frühstück hat uns auch sehr gefallen. Wir würden wieder kommen 😊

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Die Lage ist perfekt, der Blick in die Reisfelder war einfach traumhaft. Mit dem Fahrrad sind es 15min bis 20min in die Altstadt. Super-Service 👌🏻Alle waren sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit, das Frühstück - sehr lecker! Ich hab mich wie Zuhause gefühlt. Ich verstehe jetzt, warum Leute hier länger bleiben:)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Wir wurden morgens früh um 7 Uhr sehr freundlich empfangen und durften sofort mit den Fahrrädern in die Stadt fahren! Toll! Unsere geplanten Touren wurden gebucht und es hat alles wunderbar geklappt! Tolle Unterkunft, super Lage in den Reisfeldern, leckeres Frühstück und tollstes Personal 😍 wir kommen gerne wieder!!!

reviews.title: Traumhaft
reviews.positives: Wir hatten einen wundervollen Aufenthalt hier. Das Personal is super freundlich, hilfsbereit und zuvorkommend. Das Frühstück war super und sie Zimmer sind sehr geräumig. Der Blick auf die Reisfelder war traumhaft. Wir waren leider nur drei Tage dort, würden aber sofort wieder kommen.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Sehr nettes Personal, gratis Fahrräder, gutes Frühstück, Lage in den Reisfelder. Alles top.

reviews.title: Rundum toll!
reviews.positives:
Sehr gutes Frühstück. Sehr guter Service. Vielen Dank an das super nette Personal, das uns jeden Wunsch erfüllt und sich sehr gut um uns gekümmert hat. Alles super sauber. Tolle Lage zwischen Altstadt und Strand und tolle Aussicht auf den Pool und die Reisfelder. 
Highlight an heißen Tagen: Der Pool. Wir würden jedes Mal wieder kommen und das Hotel weiter empfehlen.

reviews.title: Schönes kleines Hotel mit viel Charme!
reviews.positives: Sehr schönes kleines Hotel in den Reisfeldern nahe der Altstadt von Hoi An. Das Personal war sehr freundlich und immer hilfbereit. Das Zimmer war gemütlich und sauber. Wir konnten sogar früher einchecken, da wir früher als geplant ankamen. Die Unterkunft hat uns auch bei der Planung von Trips und Touren geholfen. Kostenlose Fahrräder wurden zur Verfügung gestellt mit denen man den Ort oder die Reisfelder erkunden konnte.

reviews.title: Ich würde sofort wieder buchen!
reviews.positives: Sehr gute Lage, sehr nettes Personal!
reviews.negatives: Nichts

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Wunderschön in den Reisfeldern gelegen, entspannte Atmosphäre, leckeres Essen (Frühstück und Restaurant), kostenlose Fahrräder - man ist schnell in der Stadt und am Strand

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Struttura molto carina con vista sulle risaie. Posizione comoda a metà strada tra la città vecchia e la spiaggia. Alla fine della strada ci sono una marea di ristoranti e caffè. Bici a disposizione gratuitamente per girare tranquillamente nella zona. Staff super efficiente, molto disponibile, fanno di tutto per risolvere qualsiasi problema/richiesta.
reviews.negatives: Se proprio devo fare un appunto, la colazione é da migliorare..

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La gestione

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Posizione ottima, fuori dal caos del centro ma facilmente raggiungibile in bicicletta o scooter. Bella piscina con vista. Staff disponibile.

reviews.title: Waardeloos
reviews.positives: De locatie
reviews.negatives: Onhygiënisch, kakkerlakken op de kamer, personeel sprak geen Engels, we moesten via de telefoon met een Engels sprekende mevrouw alles regelen.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Na enig aandringen werden de 2 nachten ,die wij eerder vertrokken gerestitueerd.
reviews.negatives: Zwembad en uitzicht op foto's prachtig,helaas is de realiteit dat het toch behoorlijk lawaaig is met verkeer in de nabije straten.40 min naar de stad en 30 min naar strand lopen. Fietsen oud en geen licht, dus vaak grab nodig.

reviews.title: Fijn verblijf met mooi zwembad.
reviews.positives: Fijn zwembad, prima ruime kamer. Je kan een gratis fiets lenen.
reviews.negatives: Ligging iets wat van het centrum, maar je kan een gratis fiets pakken.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Locatie is top! Het ligt vlakbij het centrum van Hoi An. De accomodatie verhuurd gratis fietsen. Het verblijf ligt aan een redelijk drukke doorgaande weg (welke je op de foto’s niet ziet) hier gaan veel scooters langs waar je wel wat lawaai van hebt. Voor ons was dit geen probleem. Wij zijn van mening dat het hotel op het mooiste plekje van Hoi An ligt en dat beetje lawaai namen wij voor lief. Vanuit het hotel kijk je over de rijstvelden, prachtig! 
Het personeel is onwijs vriendelijk en wil alles voor je doen en regelen
reviews.negatives:
Het ontbijt is erg simpel en als je laat komt is het grotendeels op. 
Voor lunch en avondeten is het restaurant echt top!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Super plek om even uit te rusten van de soms chaotische steden in Vietnam! Zwembad is top om na een dag in Hoi An even te relaxen. De locatie is fijn en met een scooter goed te bereiken. Personeel is zo vriendelijk. Altijd geïnteresseerd in je dagplanning en altijd open voor een praatje. Ontbijt was lekker.

reviews.title: Een aanrader!
reviews.positives:
Prachtig kleinschalig rustig gelegen hotel op fietsafstand van stranden (ca. 4,5 km) en Hoi An centrum (2,5 km).
Leuk personeel, prachtige kamers, goede badkamer en super schoon. Hotel heeft gratis fietsen beschikbaar. Strand en centrum bereikbaar via fietspaden door de rijstvelden dus heerlijk rustig fietsen.
reviews.negatives: Ontbijt had voor ons westerlingen iets uitgebreider gekund. Roerei, ommelet of gebakken ei wordt ter plekke voor je gemaakt maar als je daar niet van houdt dan is jam de enige optie.

reviews.title: Heerlijke plek om Hoi An en omgeving te ontdekken
reviews.positives: Locatie, schoon, prachtig zwembad, lieve werknemers, fietsen vrij om te gebruiken
reviews.negatives: Ontbijt was niet zo uitgebreid.

reviews.title: Heerlijk vertoeven in Hoi An!
reviews.positives: Locatie, zwembadje, mooie ruime kamers!

reviews.title: Fantastisch
reviews.positives: De lokatie is schitterend,  het personeel meer dan vriendelijke en behulpzaam. Alles kunnen ze voor je regelen en niets is ze te veel. Heerlijk zwembad met prima zitjes en schitterend uitzicht. Erg leuke gesprekken gehad met Thaim en zou hier graag terugkomen. Je loopt zo de rijstvelden in, ondanks dat er overal scooters rijden. Zelfs buffels gezien. Ik zou deze villa iedereen aanraden. Volop genieten van een mooi Hanoi.
reviews.negatives: Niets, genieten daar

reviews.title: We hebben het onwijs naar onze zin gehad!
reviews.positives: Het ontbijt was niet uitgebreid, maar het was voor ons ruim voldoende. Een lekker eitje werd klaargemaakt en je kon eventueel wat Vietnamees eten. Fietsen waren gratis en scooters werden op bestelling geleverd. We zaten heerlijk aan de rand van een rijstveldje en je kon door de rijstvelden naar de stad fietsen in ca. 15 min. Het zwembad was na een dagje stad ook heerlijk. Het personeel was heel aardig en zeer behulpzaam.
reviews.negatives: Wat ons betreft, zeker voor de prijs, was het een uitstekende plaats om een paar dagen te vertoeven. Dus wat viel er tegen: eigenlijk niets.

reviews.title: Leuk verblijf met zalig zwembad en gratis fietsen
reviews.positives:
De kamers zijn netjes en het zwembad is zalig om te verkoelen. Je hebt een prachtig uitzicht op de rijstvelden.

Het was ook super leuk dat je gratis fietsen kon huren. We zijn voortdurend op en af de Old Town en het strand kunnen fietsen, waardoor je overal snel geraakte.

Het personeel was heel vriendelijk en deed hun best om zo goed mogelijk Engels te praten.
reviews.negatives: Het enige minpuntje voor ons was dat de fietsen geen lichtjes hebben. Je kon ze lenen tot 10u ‘s avonds, maar het is donker vanaf 6. We hadden toevallig zelf een koplamp bij en hebben die dan gebruikt.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Geweldige ligging, vriendelijk personeel

reviews.title: Heerlijk
reviews.positives:
Ligt prachtig aan de rand van de bewoonde wereld zo met uitzicht op de rijstvelden en je rijdt zo met de fiets of scooter naar de kust.
s’Morgens staat er iemand in de buiten keuken waar je een eitje klaar kan laten maken, verder is er ontbijt buffet
reviews.negatives: Niks

reviews.title: Zwemmen tussen de rijstvelden
reviews.positives:
De gastvrijheid!!
Idyllische ligging tussen de rijstvelden, het strand en de oude stad. Rustig maar toch dicht bij alles.
Het vers gemaakte ontbijt iedere ochtend.
Comfortabele en propere kamers.
Gastvrouw Thăm is zeer behulpzaam!!

Tip: het restaurant er naast is zeker een bezoekje waard!!
reviews.negatives: Niets

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Het zwembad ligt grotendeels in de schaduw en blijft heerlijk koel. Wij waren blij dat we voor een locatie tussen het strand en het centrum hebben gekozen. Restaurants, spa en bars zijn nog steeds voldoende om de hoek. Daardoor ligt het hotel ook iets minder idyllisch dan de foto's wellicht suggereren maar de gehele omgeving van Hoi An is relatief ' dichtbevolkt'. .
reviews.negatives: De balkons hebben geen privacy. Dat is niet heel erg omdat het door de week rustig is in het hotel. Vietnamese toeristen lijken in het algemeen alleen op de zaterdagavond te verblijven.

reviews.title: Heerlijk verblijf
reviews.positives:
De ruime kamer was heerlijk. Wij zaten in 302A en hadden een top uitzicht. Het zwembad was verkoelend. Het ontbijt was simpel maar o zo lekker. 
De receptie stond altijd open voor een praatje of advies. De gratis fietsen zijn ideaal
reviews.negatives: De waterdruk was soms even weg. Er kwam soms een druppel uit de onderzijde van de airconditioning. Die viel op het kussen.

reviews.title: מקום יפה ושקט
reviews.positives: מקום יפה בין שדות אורז, צוות העובדים נעים ומוכן לעזור בכל שאלה
reviews.negatives:
אין מעלית, נאלצנו לעלות במדרגות  שתי קומות עם המזוודות 
ארוחת בוקר בסיסית ביותר

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Phòng khá đơn giản, ăn quá sơ sài, phụ thu trẻ em quá cao

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: không có chỗ đỗ ô tô

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Được

reviews.title: Đây là 1 kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Sunkised Paddy Hội An Villa
reviews.positives: Bữa sáng rất ngon, được chuẩn bị chu đáo, tiếp tân, đầu bếp và các anh chị phục vụ đều rất vui vẻ, thân thiện, nhiệt tình. Khung cảnh xung quanh bình yên và trong lạnh, khoảng cách lại không quá xa phố cổ, rất thích hợp cho cặp đôi và gia đình, đặc biệt là vào mùa hè.
reviews.negatives: Quạt trần trong phòng không thể điều chỉnh được nên quạt rất mạnh

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: View đẹp ,nhân viên thân thiện ,mọi thứ rất hài lòng

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Không gian đẹp,thoáng mát,sạch sẽ.Đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện.Rất tuyệt vời.
reviews.negatives: Vòi nước áp lực hơi yếu một chút ;)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Villa đẹp, phòng sạch sẽ, thiết kế phòng khá đẹp và độc đáo. Nghỉ ngơi tốt, nệm êm. View hồ bơi rất thích. Ăn sáng ổn, không nhiều món. Nói chung mọi thử ở đây khá hài lòng
reviews.negatives: Khách sạn cần thay đổi cách bố trí khách phù hợp hơn. Phòng đi đoàn và có trẻ em nên sắp xếp ở dưới. Sắp xếp ở trên trẻ em chạy nhảy những phòng dưới khá ồn, nghe tiếng chạy, nhảy mất yên tĩnh

reviews.title: Trải nghiệm tuyệt vời ạ
reviews.positives:
+ Breakfast: Mặc dù mình có việc gấp phải về sớm hơn dự kiến và sớm hơn giờ khách sạn setup breakfast, nhưng nhân viên vẫn hỗ trợ và phục vụ nhiệt tình hết sức. 
+ Room space: Không gian hợp với mình, từ giường cho đến khu vực vệ sinh. Rất sạch sẽ và không điểm nào chê ạ.
reviews.negatives: Không điều gì.

reviews.title: Не хотелось уезжать
reviews.positives: Отличное расположение, бассейн, уютный номер, приятный персонал, готовый всегда помочь.
reviews.negatives: Скорее пожелания : разнообразить завтраки и заменить пластиковые баночки для шампуня и геля для душа.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Внимательный и приветливый персонал, хороший номер, бассейн. В шаговой доступности местный рынок, где можно было купить свежие фрукты.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Прекрасное расположение,бассейн с видом на рисовые поля,тишина
reviews.negatives: Я бы поменял меню завтрака

reviews.title: Idealne miejsce na odpoczynek
reviews.positives: Cisza spokój, klimatyczne pokoje i kameralny basen. Darmowe rowery, świetna lokalizacja. Nasz pobyt był zbyt krótki! Chętnie jeszcze wrócimy:)
reviews.negatives: Śniadania mogłyby być ciekawsze

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Bejártam a fél világot de ilyen szuper szállásom még nem volt. Imádtam!
reviews.negatives: Olyan nincs!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Personalet var utroligt søde og imødekommende. Dejlig morgenmad og skøn pool.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Hyggeligt lille hotel tæt på Hoi An centrum og stranden. Gode store værelser og en lækker pool. Hoi An centrum kan være meget travl, så det er helt perfekt at komme tilbage til det rolige hotel med udsigt til rismarker. Hotellet havde nogle gamle cykler vi gratis kunne låne, og dem brugte vi en del til at komme rundt. Stor anbefaling fra os.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Det var super hyggeligt med utroligt venligt og hjælpsom personale - Tham var til stor hjælp. Stedet lever helt klart op til beskrivelsen og billederne. Kan kun anbefale stedet til andre.

reviews.title: Idyllisk hotel med mange muligheder
reviews.positives: Tham var behjælpelig med alt, vi skulle bruge, endda under højtiden Tet. Hun hjalp os med scooterleje, bil mm.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: We didn't stay
reviews.negatives: There place was small then appeared from the outside and the all the fields were mud when we went. we ended up book a completely different location due to the lack of view and smell from the feild from all the mud and moisture

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Setting
reviews.negatives: Tried to charge for a dirty towel. Breakfast was stone cold as no food warmers

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Damp room
Bedding was damp
Cold shower
Hard to contact staff
I got sick from being here

reviews.title: There are way better places to stay in Hoi A for the money.
reviews.positives: Pool was nice and it was great to be able to use  the bikes
reviews.negatives: Beside a building site which is really noisy and the road beside the property is also really noisy

reviews.title: Not as good as the description.
reviews.positives: There were only 3 options. Fried eggs plain omelet. or noodles. And the so-called coffee shop didn.t exists. All though the staff tried very hard to compensate.
reviews.negatives: An accurate description of what was available for breakfast. And more consistency. on how the meals were prepared. The staff there had to do everything from. Receptionist, cook breakfast, clean the area and be head cook and bottle washer.

reviews.title: Average Stay - Great Location away from city centre
reviews.positives: The setting and location of the hotel in the rice paddy's made for a nice stay. Quite evenings with rural serenity. Staff is really friendly and accommodating
reviews.negatives: The rooms seems to be runned down and old. They can definitely do with a repaint and slight renovation. The breakfast is very limited with no real options to choose from.

reviews.title: Welcoming but simple.
reviews.positives: Staff friendliness, accommodation of late arrival and check in; breakfast chef.
reviews.negatives: The place was marketed above true standard, this is NOT a 4/5 star hotel, more of a backpackers experience which is how we chose to view it. Pictures and descriptions published on booking.com are unfortunately misleading, which leads to disappointment upon arrival. Noisy at night. Breakfast is limited compared to other places we’ve stayed at in Vietnam.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: When you close the door there is still a huge gap beetwen the doors which lets inside all of the mosquitos and also geckos. The room even with A/C is very hot

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very nice staff, good placement, close to town. Nice that we could borrow bikes and cycle to the city
reviews.negatives: Our room was very damp, and because of this our towels didn’t dry in the room, and the linen was damp to sleep in

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good size room, nice pool, clean
reviews.negatives:
Construction going on right outside hotel- difficult to carry luggage past 
40mins walk into hoi an centre so location could have been slightly better

reviews.title: Our stay at Sunkissed Paddy Hoi An Villa was convenient, comfortable and very pleasant.
reviews.positives: We loved the pool and our room itself, the location was pleasant to get out of the city's craziness without being too far away. We could still ride our bikes (complimentary bike hire was great) to the beach and old town conveniently.
reviews.negatives: We didn't like the requirement to pay additional costs for amenities such as towels, extra water, bedding etc.

reviews.title: Great facilities, kind staff!
reviews.positives: Lovely pool, peaceful surroundings & clean rooms. The staff was very kind. They noticed on our passports that one of our friends had their birthday during our stay here and they bought her a birthday cake! Thanks again for that :)
reviews.negatives: The recommendations on what to do and where to eat in Hoi An were too touristy for our liking.

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.positives: Lovely little find nice and quiet
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nice location.
reviews.negatives: Construction next to it a bit noisy. Also I requested a room up floor and we were in the ground floor next to the kitchen with open wall to it.

reviews.title: Nice, comfortable stay in the rice fields
reviews.positives: Nice and quiet with a super comfy bed. Bathroom was great. Friendly staff and good breakfast
reviews.negatives: Pressure on the shower disappeared when you had it hot, but was still nice.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Breakfast is simple but good taste. Swimming pool is clean. The receptionist is nice. Service is good.

reviews.title: An ideal place to spend time in Hoi An.
reviews.positives:
It’s nice, clean and close to Hoi A town and the beach. 
They also have bikes you can borrow (15 minutes to city center or beach)
The staff is really nice and helpful.
reviews.negatives: It’s not very well insulated, so you can hear basically everything (neighbors, the roosters at 1 am).

reviews.title: Returning customer
reviews.positives: Third time staying at sunkissed paddy , staff are expectational . Beds are super comfy , clean and comfortable. Very affordable stay .
reviews.negatives: Lack of storage space in bedrooms

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.positives: Very clean and great rooms! Staff were lovely and helpful

reviews.title: Superb Location, Quiet Rooms - Great Value
reviews.positives:
There were only four to five people staying at the hotel so breakfast was scaled back from the normal buffet breakfast. Still, it was freshly prepared by the Crazy Chef, Mr Hong, and very tasty. Nice quiet location with a lovely swimming pool and five minutes walk to the nearest small community. There is a small store approx 350m from the hotel and a good restaurant right next to the hotel. 55000VDN (approx £1.51) in a GRAB Taxi Car (a lot cheaper on a GRAB motorbike Taxi) to Hoi An Old Town. Motortbike hire approx 500m from the hotel where for £2.50 - £3.50 you can hire mopeds / Motorbikes for 24hrs. A litre of petrol is approx £0.55 per litre.
We must mention Miss Tham, receptionist, great service and fixes any problem for you....Thanks Tham.
reviews.negatives: Nothing!

reviews.title: Absolutely loved our stay here and would recommend it highly
reviews.positives: The location was perfect for the beach, old town, countryside. The staff were very helpful and friendly The pool was lovely and the room comfortable
reviews.negatives: Just a bit disappointed about the early morning we left and the night porter was asking for payment when we’d already paid

reviews.title: Beautiful villa overlooking the paddy view and suburb, 10 mins bike ride to Hoi An old town
reviews.positives: Excellent customer service, clean and beautiful location with exceptional view of the suburbs but only 10 minutes bicycle ride to Hoi An old town

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Good location, very kind and friendly staff and a really nice place.
reviews.negatives: Unfortunately they didnt change towels/clean room during our 4 night stay

reviews.title: Beautiful oasis
reviews.positives: We loved our stay at subsidised Paddy Villa, it looks exactly like the photos and is a calm oasis away from the hustle and bustle of the main town. The free bikes were great and we used them every day. The staff were lovely and helped us organise both of our transfers to and from airport. We extended our stay by two nights because we loved this accomodation so much! 😊
reviews.negatives: Air con didn’t work that well in our room but it was quite cold during our stay so it was not needed every night.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: We enjoyed the relaxed atmosphere at Sunkised Paddy. The staff were very warm and friendly. The beds and pillows were the most comfortable in Vietnam. The pool very clean as was the room and bathroom. A big thank you to Thu for her lovely parting gift, very thoughtful.

reviews.title: Small and friendly hotel
reviews.positives: We had an amazing stay here. The old town is an easy 10 mins bike ride (bikes provided by the hotel for free with locks). It is quiet and relaxing compared to the old town. All the staff were incredible - friendly and helpful with recommendations. The breakfast was a choice of local style noodles, omelette and/or fruit. Beef pho was my favourite. They helped book our cooking course. Prices at the hotel were the same as in town. We were there in the rainy season so the umbrella was also a godsend!
reviews.negatives: Air con was not very powerful initially but the room was adequately cool once you gave it some time.

reviews.title: Relax stay in Hoi an
reviews.positives: The staff, location, light
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: A very comfortable expérience, would stay there again, highly recommended
reviews.positives: Its location and ambience, pleasant staff, nice views
reviews.negatives: Water flow in shower was very weak

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Quiet location and helpful staff
reviews.negatives: Lot of insects

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Our host Jenny
did everything for us to make our stay unforgettable.
She is the best! Thank you Jenny.

reviews.title: Lovely stay within the ricefields close to the old city. Free bike services!
reviews.positives: It’s beautiful! Exactly like the pictures. Picturesque in the rice fields and great location between beach and old town. Beautiful hotel with nice swimming pool
reviews.negatives: Nothing!

reviews.title: great stay
reviews.positives: very friendly staff, room was great, pool very nice (although a little warm - but that is the case in Vietnam everywhere), very cheap food/ drinks at the pool, breakfast was nice. easy taxi ride into town ($2aud)
reviews.negatives: be mindful that the rice fields are obviously plowed, we unfortunately arrived when they had been plowed (may), so it just earth, no green rice field! but not a fault of the hotel!

reviews.title: Lovely stay at Hoi An
reviews.positives: Nice room, nice swimming pool and nice breakfast!! Great value for money! Really beautiful location

reviews.title: Comfy hotel in amongst rice paddies, supportive staff with great pool
reviews.positives: Great little hotel, with staff that are happy to provide tours or advice on what to visit in Hoi an. Nice and quiet, with a great pool. Rooms are very nice and well equipped.
reviews.negatives: A little far from town, requires a 50,000D cab fare into town each way, which is massive, but it takes around 20mins. We picked this place partially for the rice paddy views, however, it's a risk you might get mud flats if rice has been harvested, which is what we got :( Still a great stay, but a shame.

reviews.title: Beautiful location
reviews.positives: I love the location of this hotel in An My , beautiful outlook over the paddy field . But only 5 mins (bike) from Hoi an . Breakfast varied each day which was enjoyable and staff were excellent . Spacious room with views
reviews.negatives: More sun loungers round pool area

reviews.title: I would recommend staying here because the location is excellent, a great starting point for bike trips, not too far fro
reviews.positives: The pool and the stunning location in the middle of a rice field
reviews.negatives: No hangers in the bathroom for towels. No storage space in the closet.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
The location was just beautiful with views of rice paddies and just a bike ride to the beach and to the Hoi An old town. 
The buffet breakfast has been the best I have had in Vietnam so far in terms of the uniqueness of the dishes, variety and taste.  The place was quite and clean too.  They also had free bikes you could use.  Would definitely stay here again if visiting Hoi An.
reviews.negatives: For some reason the cold water was not working that well in the shower so the water temperature was just a bit hotter than what I would normally use.  Hopefully it is an easy fix.  Our towels were also not changed during the duration of our stay but again not a big thing.

reviews.title: Clean comfy room overlooking a gorgeous pool and paddy fields.
reviews.positives: Clean comfy room with strong hot shower. Gorgeous pool overlooking the paddy fields. Loved cycling around them on the free bikes to the town and A Bang beach. 30 min walk/40kvnd Grab taxi into Hoi An centre. Tham and Te were so kind and helpful.
reviews.negatives: Basic but adequate breakfast and either coffee OR juice.

reviews.title: Recommend.
reviews.positives: Staff were super welcoming and friendly. Went out of way to make me feel at home.

reviews.title: Great value for money and helpful staff
reviews.positives:
Staff was very friendly and especially THĂM was great. She was great in organizing restaurants, taxi’s, motorbikes! 
Rooms are big!
reviews.negatives: We missed good coffee for breakfast

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Is a beautiful quiet place slightly further than the busy Hoi An touristy location. Which is a good choice for us as we wanted quality sleep. You can easily rent a bike at the hotel to move around & the breakfast was superb enjoyed with the pool & paddy fields view. Room was spacious enough & will come back again. We also booked a private car with Tham to Ba Na Hills with a reasonable price.

reviews.title: Stay at Sunkissed Paddy
reviews.positives: Nice views from the room and separated from the old town and An Bang beach area but still a close drive to both. The room was very clean and the bed was comfortable. Beautiful pool overlooking the fields and breakfast was quite good. All the staff were amazing as well. Tham is an extremely kind, positive and beautiful person who is lovely to talk to and very helpful. Highly recommend and would definitely stay again in the future:)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Sunkissed Paddy Hoi An was an absolutely wonderful place to stay, the most peaceful and serene location you could pick in Hoi An. It’s set right in the rice paddies and the views are just stunning, waking up to that scenery every day was such a special experience. The pool overlooking the rice fields is also fantastic and makes the whole place feel even more relaxing. The location is perfect too, far enough from the Old Town to feel calm and quiet but still very easy to reach by bike, walking, or a quick Grab ride, it’s also close to An Bang Beach and the coconut boat area which makes it a great base for exploring. The rooms are beautiful, very spacious and thoughtfully designed, the beds were incredibly comfortable and the pillows were great as well, and each room has a lovely balcony or terrace which is perfect for sitting and enjoying the peaceful surroundings. Breakfast was amazing every morning, and the staff made the experience even better, both receptionists we interacted with were so friendly and helpful and the breakfast chef was incredibly kind too. We felt so welcome the whole time. I genuinely couldn’t recommend or compliment this place enough!

reviews.title: Home from home
reviews.positives: Tham and her team were just so amazingly warm and kind, such great value for money and great location on the outskirts of Hoi an just a quick taxi or cycle. Easily cycle on the free bikes across the paddy fields to see real life agricultural of the locals. Wonderful fresh Cooked food from the chef.. we  will recommend to all our friends ..

reviews.title: A relaxing stay in the rice paddies
reviews.positives:
My 3 year old son and I had a wonderful stay here. The staff were so kind to him, especially Tam, who was just so helpful in general.
The location was peaceful, and the free bicycles were perfect for exploring. 
I'd definitely stay here again next time we visit Hoi An.

reviews.title: The best stay in Hoi An
reviews.positives:
The stay here was good and very peaceful. This place is near the beach,to the ancient town, to shops, gas stations etc which makes it the best choice. The host is very cheerful and helped us a lot.
A 10 stars for the place, the food, the serene sunset view by the paddy fields and to the amazing care taker.
